title: Neo-Imperial style
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Neo-[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] style''' was a type of clothing style in vogue on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] following the [[Pellaeon–Gavrisom Treaty|Bastion Accords]].<ref name="Union 2">[[Union 2|''Union'' 2]]</ref>

==Appearances==
*[[Union 2|''Union'' 2]]
